_README: CANONICAL DATA SOURCES. Check this + catalog/data.md BEFORE downloading anything. If an asset is here and catalog/data.md shows the date range you need, DO NOT re-download - load the CSV. To add a source, follow docs/runbooks/add-data-source.md.

assets.name: WisdomTree EURO STOXX Banks 3x Daily Leveraged (GBX, ISIN IE00BLS09N40)

auxiliary.name: T-bill rate (13-week)
auxiliary.use: risk-free rate + borrow-cost base; default 3% before history

auxiliary.name: VIX
auxiliary.use: VIX-linked borrow spread; default 20.0 before history

etp_models.name: 3x S&P 500
etp_models.use: real ETP daily returns in etp_leverage.py (synthetic daily-reset fallback pre-inception)

live_quotes.note: Cloudflare Worker CORS proxy for intraday Yahoo quotes; used live only by the gold page.

_data_notes: spx_daily.csv / ndx_daily.csv cache only ~30 years (from ~1996) for the website. The FULL S&P history back to 1950-01-03 is downloaded on demand by backtest_spx_distance_scale.py and embedded in spx_distance_scale_site_data.json - it is NOT stored in spx_daily.csv. Need pre-1996 SPX? Reuse that JSON / script before re-downloading.
Two writers touch each *_daily.csv: the cron (full precision .12g) and backtests (.9g, ~30y) - expect churn; never hand-edit them.
gold uses GC=F (futures), which begins 2000-08; longer gold history needs a different proxy.
msci_world is deliberately clamped to 2009-12-01 (pre-2009 Yahoo SWDA.L data is unreliable).
